---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new field, car, or feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like to see?**
Example: "Add support for editing wheel size on the Skyline"

**Why would this be useful?**
Brief explanation for the modding community.

**Do you have offset information?**
If you've done hex analysis and have confirmed offsets, share them here — it will speed up implementation greatly.
